---
title: "2020039 - PERCEPCION REMOTA"
subtitle: "Academic Year: 2026"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-important collapse=false}
## 📢  Grades for Informe No. 1 

(07/04/2026)

- [Notas Informe No. 1](2026/figures/Informe1.png)

:::

::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢  Submit your Informe No. 1 timely

(24/03/2026)

- Upload *your Informe No. 1* not later than on 25th March.

:::


::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢  What you will report in Informe No. 1?

(26/02/2026)

- Reproduce the *remote sensing study* you selected for Informe No.1.

:::


::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢  What you will report in Informe No. 1?

(18/02/2026)

- Identify the *remote sensing study* you will reproduce, either using GEE or any other tools. Write a one-page document and print it.

:::


::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢  What you learned from the selected paper?

(13/02/2026)

- Identify the core research question, understand the data & methodology used to test the hypothesis, and evaluate the validity of the results and conclusions. 

:::

::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢 Syllabus

(02/02/2026)

- [🗓️ Know the syllabus here!](2026/syllabus.qmd)

:::

# 🧑🏻‍🏫 Our Team

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Course Convenor


![](../figures/people/ials.png){fig-align="left" fig-alt="Photo of IVAN LIZARAZO" style="object-fit: cover;width:6em;height:6em;border-radius: 50%;"}  
**IVAN LIZARAZO** <br/>
_ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR_ <br/>
UNAL</a><br/>
📧 [ializarazos@unal.edu.co](mailto:)

Office Hours: 

- When: Wednesdays 8:00 am - 9:00 am
- Where: Oficina 333
- How to book: via e-mail

## Teaching Staff

**IALS**

:::

# 📍 Dates - Location

Wednesdays 2pm-6pm at SALON 103
